# comfyui_kling_video_extend_node (Resource)

Kling Video Extend Node. Extend videos made by other Kling nodes. The video_id is created by using other Kling Nodes. [api node/video/Kling] Hidden runtime inputs: auth_token_comfy_org (AUTH_TOKEN_COMFY_ORG), api_key_comfy_org (API_KEY_COMFY_ORG), unique_id (UNIQUE_ID). Source: comfy_api_nodes/nodes_kling.py:2017 (v3_api).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cfg_scale` (Number) Input: FLOAT. Default: 0.5. Allowed range: 0.0 to 1.0.
- `negative_prompt` (String) Input: STRING. Supports multiline text. Tooltip: Negative text prompt for elements to avoid in the extended video.
- `prompt` (String) Input: STRING. Supports multiline text. Tooltip: Positive text prompt for guiding the video extension.
- `video_id` (String) Input: STRING. Tooltip: The ID of the video to be extended. Supports videos generated by text-to-video, image-to-video, and previous video extension operations. Cannot exceed 3 minutes total duration after extension.

### Read-Only

- `duration_output` (String) Output: STRING (slot 2).
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance.
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type.
- `video_id_output` (String) Output: STRING (slot 1).
- `video_output` (String) Output: VIDEO (slot 0).
